name: Cynthia K. Delia
description: Cynthia came from a broken home, consisting of only a father and her. Her mother had passed at the age of 16 from cancer, leaving her father a shell of a man. He was neglectful, leaving Cynthia to make her own way to have fun. This included robotics and machinery, which she became extremely good at in a short period of time. Although, getting distracted around a machine can have consequences, leaving her with a mutilated left arm which in the end was only able to be amputated. She didn’t let this stop her, Making her own robotic arm. Best part? It’s solar powered!
creator: jumpixii
